label: CP-7(6)
title: Inability to Return to Primary Site

prose.en: Plan and prepare for circumstances that preclude returning to the primary processing site.

guidance.en: There may be situations that preclude an organization from returning to the primary processing site such as if a natural disaster (e.g., flood or a hurricane) damaged or destroyed a facility and it was determined that rebuilding in the same location was not prudent.

prose.en: circumstances that preclude returning to the primary processing site are planned for;
circumstances that preclude returning to the primary processing site are prepared for.

objects.en: Organizational personnel with system reconstitution responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
